markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Onboard Deyan to GrowthX's services and align on future collaboration.](https://fathom.video/share/y99H2C9fx55zgJJpNaT89BHCEWBCzuUW?tab=summary&timestamp=27.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Content is blocked by strategy gaps.** A large backlog of articles is stalled, requiring a full review to update outdated messaging (e.g., "HX Renew" is now "the platform") and align with a new, undefined brand strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/y99H2C9fx55zgJJpNaT89BHCEWBCzuUW?tab=summary&timestamp=592.0)
  - [**GrowthX's AI engine requires clear inputs.** The system's output quality depends on up-to-date "artifacts" (writing guidelines, positioning briefs). Deyan's team must provide these to unblock content production.](https://fathom.video/share/y99H2C9fx55zgJJpNaT89BHCEWBCzuUW?tab=summary&timestamp=535.0)
  - [**A new campaign will drive the content strategy.** The upcoming "underwriting workbench" campaign will define the new positioning and content pillars, which will then guide all future GrowthX work.](https://fathom.video/share/y99H2C9fx55zgJJpNaT89BHCEWBCzuUW?tab=summary&timestamp=1286.0)
  - [**A planning session is set for late January.** HX will brief GrowthX on the new campaign strategy to define how the AI engine can support multi-format content creation (e.g., articles from proprietary research, interactive infographics).](https://fathom.video/share/y99H2C9fx55zgJJpNaT89BHCEWBCzuUW?tab=summary&timestamp=1479.0)

## Topics

### HX Corporate Marketing Context

  - [Deyan leads the Corporate Marketing team, which is shifting focus from demand gen to brand building.](https://fathom.video/share/y99H2C9fx55zgJJpNaT89BHCEWBCzuUW?tab=summary&timestamp=89.0)
  - [The team is in a transitional phase, building out five key pillars:](https://fathom.video/share/y99H2C9fx55zgJJpNaT89BHCEWBCzuUW?tab=summary&timestamp=116.0)
      - [**Brand Marketing:** Defining brand strategy, standards, and creative production.](https://fathom.video/share/y99H2C9fx55zgJJpNaT89BHCEWBCzuUW?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)
      - [**Comms & PR:** External media relations, with US investment planned for 2026.](https://fathom.video/share/y99H2C9fx55zgJJpNaT89BHCEWBCzuUW?tab=summary&timestamp=158.0)
      - [**Content & Website:** Top-leadership content, website operations, and social media.](https://fathom.video/share/y99H2C9fx55zgJJpNaT89BHCEWBCzuUW?tab=summary&timestamp=177.0)
      - [**Campaigns:** Running the first integrated brand-to-demand campaign in 2026.](https://fathom.video/share/y99H2C9fx55zgJJpNaT89BHCEWBCzuUW?tab=summary&timestamp=239.0)
      - [**Events:** Corporate and Tier 1 events.](https://fathom.video/share/y99H2C9fx55zgJJpNaT89BHCEWBCzuUW?tab=summary&timestamp=256.0)
  - [**Future State:** A separate "Growth" team will eventually own demand-driven activities like ABM and campaigns.](https://fathom.video/share/y99H2C9fx55zgJJpNaT89BHCEWBCzuUW?tab=summary&timestamp=272.0)

### GrowthX's AI Content Engine

  - [GrowthX is a strategic growth partner using an AI engine to produce SEO/AEO-optimized content.](https://fathom.video/share/y99H2C9fx55zgJJpNaT89BHCEWBCzuUW?tab=summary&timestamp=367.0)
  - [**Process:**](https://fathom.video/share/y99H2C9fx55zgJJpNaT89BHCEWBCzuUW?tab=summary&timestamp=411.0)
    1.  [**Strategy Sprint:** Defines company context, personas, and SEO/AEO strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/y99H2C9fx55zgJJpNaT89BHCEWBCzuUW?tab=summary&timestamp=411.0)
    2.  [**Artifacts:** Creates foundational documents (writing guidelines, competitor briefs) in Notion.](https://fathom.video/share/y99H2C9fx55zgJJpNaT89BHCEWBCzuUW?tab=summary&timestamp=441.0)
    3.  [**AI Pipeline:** The engine uses these artifacts to generate content, combining tools like Claude (drafting) and Exa (research).](https://fathom.video/share/y99H2C9fx55zgJJpNaT89BHCEWBCzuUW?tab=summary&timestamp=679.0)
    4.  [**Human Oversight:** An editor (Rachel) reviews inputs and outputs at key steps.](https://fathom.video/share/y99H2C9fx55zgJJpNaT89BHCEWBCzuUW?tab=summary&timestamp=738.0)
  - [**Key Insight:** Updating the artifacts directly improves output quality and reduces the need for manual review.](https://fathom.video/share/y99H2C9fx55zgJJpNaT89BHCEWBCzuUW?tab=summary&timestamp=535.0)

### Current Content Blockers

  - [**Outdated Messaging:** The content backlog uses old terminology (e.g., "HX Renew"), requiring a full review and refresh.](https://fathom.video/share/y99H2C9fx55zgJJpNaT89BHCEWBCzuUW?tab=summary&timestamp=628.0)
  - [**Undefined Brand Strategy:** The lack of clear guidelines for tone of voice and visual style prevents content from being published.](https://fathom.video/share/y99H2C9fx55zgJJpNaT89BHCEWBCzuUW?tab=summary&timestamp=1153.0)
  - [**Website Operations:** No clear owner for publishing content on the new Framer site.](https://fathom.video/share/y99H2C9fx55zgJJpNaT89BHCEWBCzuUW?tab=summary&timestamp=216.0)
  - [**Image Strategy:** No decision on using stock vs. graphic images, which blocks the AI image generation pipeline.](https://fathom.video/share/y99H2C9fx55zgJJpNaT89BHCEWBCzuUW?tab=summary&timestamp=1207.0)

### Future Collaboration: "Underwriting Workbench" Campaign

  - [HX is launching a major campaign around the "underwriting workbench" category.](https://fathom.video/share/y99H2C9fx55zgJJpNaT89BHCEWBCzuUW?tab=summary&timestamp=1286.0)
  - [**Goal:** Use GrowthX's engine to support a multi-format content strategy built from a central piece of proprietary research.](https://fathom.video/share/y99H2C9fx55zgJJpNaT89BHCEWBCzuUW?tab=summary&timestamp=1286.0)
  - [**Potential Formats:**](https://fathom.video/share/y99H2C9fx55zgJJpNaT89BHCEWBCzuUW?tab=summary&timestamp=1321.0)
      - [Interactive landing pages](https://fathom.video/share/y99H2C9fx55zgJJpNaT89BHCEWBCzuUW?tab=summary&timestamp=1321.0)
      - [Infographics](https://fathom.video/share/y99H2C9fx55zgJJpNaT89BHCEWBCzuUW?tab=summary&timestamp=1321.0)
      - [Guides](https://fathom.video/share/y99H2C9fx55zgJJpNaT89BHCEWBCzuUW?tab=summary&timestamp=1321.0)
      - [Blog series](https://fathom.video/share/y99H2C9fx55zgJJpNaT89BHCEWBCzuUW?tab=summary&timestamp=1321.0)
  - [GrowthX can also build pipelines to repurpose other HX content, such as podcast transcripts, to enrich blog posts and improve search performance.](https://fathom.video/share/y99H2C9fx55zgJJpNaT89BHCEWBCzuUW?tab=summary&timestamp=1423.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Deyan:**](https://fathom.video/share/y99H2C9fx55zgJJpNaT89BHCEWBCzuUW?tab=summary&timestamp=1050.0)
      - [Resolve the image strategy (stock vs. graphic) to unblock the AI image pipeline.](https://fathom.video/share/y99H2C9fx55zgJJpNaT89BHCEWBCzuUW?tab=summary&timestamp=1207.0)
      - [Assign a clear owner for website content operations.](https://fathom.video/share/y99H2C9fx55zgJJpNaT89BHCEWBCzuUW?tab=summary&timestamp=216.0)
  - [**HX Marketing Team:**](https://fathom.video/share/y99H2C9fx55zgJJpNaT89BHCEWBCzuUW?tab=summary&timestamp=1502.0)
      - [Develop the "underwriting workbench" campaign strategy and content pillars.](https://fathom.video/share/y99H2C9fx55zgJJpNaT89BHCEWBCzuUW?tab=summary&timestamp=1502.0)
      - [Draft initial brand guidelines (tone of voice, visual style) to update GrowthX's artifacts.](https://fathom.video/share/y99H2C9fx55zgJJpNaT89BHCEWBCzuUW?tab=summary&timestamp=1153.0)
  - [**HX & GrowthX:**](https://fathom.video/share/y99H2C9fx55zgJJpNaT89BHCEWBCzuUW?tab=summary&timestamp=1479.0)
      - [Schedule a planning session in late January to brief GrowthX on the new campaign and define collaboration.](https://fathom.video/share/y99H2C9fx55zgJJpNaT89BHCEWBCzuUW?tab=summary&timestamp=1479.0)
